selection_surface: question-time de-vigged 1X2 market probability gap between top1 and top2
historical_reference_warning: Threshold hypotheses were identified from retrospective 2025/26 or 2025 market averages without original quote timestamps. They are not historical PIT evidence and cannot authorize formal promotion.

non_candidate_domains.SUI_SuperLeague: retrospective gap>=0.30 accuracy below 0.70 and selected sample small
non_candidate_domains.JPN_J1: retrospective gap>=0.30 accuracy about 0.697 on only 33 matches
non_candidate_domains.NED_Eredivisie: proper-score market advantage did not pass strict bootstrap gate
non_candidate_domains.BRA_SerieA: proper-score market advantage did not pass strict bootstrap gate
non_candidate_domains.ARG_Primera: proper-score market advantage did not pass strict bootstrap gate

runtime_shadow_policy: When a future question-time market snapshot passes V5.2.3 and the competition is registered above, compute the de-vigged 1X2 gap. If gap >= threshold, record a SHADOW_MARKET_HIGH_CONFIDENCE_DIRECTION using the market Top-1 outcome. Do not replace the formal CURRENT direction or alter the unified score matrix until prospective validation and formal promotion are complete.
